Composable routing for modern onchain flows

Route value with speed, clarity and control.

QIE Smart Router aggregates paths, optimizes execution, and makes it easy to ship a reliable routing experience across tokens, vaults, and protocols.

Get started Explore SDK
Fast quotes Sub-second routing
Safer execution Guardrails by design
Portable Drop-in adapters
Live route 0x…a9f1
USDC cUSDC
Path Vault → Adapter → Swap
Slippage 0.25%
Estimated gas 142k
Outcome Optimized

A routing layer you can trust

Inspired by modern L2 product sites: crisp type, calm density, and high-signal content. Built to scale from mobile to wide screens without losing focus.

Quote engine

Deterministic outputs with clear assumptions: slippage, gas, and route constraints surfaced early.

Composable adapters

Plug vaults, swaps, and yield primitives into a single interface. Mix routes without rewriting UI logic.

Execution guardrails

Route validation and limits help reduce bad fills and reverts, keeping transactions predictable.

Built for builders

A lightweight SDK pattern: get a quote, show a route, execute with confidence. Everything is designed to be inspectable.

  • 1 Simple primitives: token in → token out, plus optional hops.
  • 2 Adapters for ERC-4626 vaults and protocols.
  • 3 Typed outputs, predictable error handling, clear UX states.
Read docs See examples
quote.ts 
const quote = await router.quote({
  tokenIn: "USDC",
  tokenOut: "WETH",
  amountIn: "1000e6",
  maxSlippageBps: 25
})

ui.renderRoute(quote.route)

await router.execute(quote, {
  recipient: wallet.address
})
Adapters
ERC-4626 · DEX · Lending
Networks
Mainnet · L2 · Appchains

Security posture

Strong defaults with room for customization: strict route validation, explicit allowances, and predictable reverts.

Transparent constraints

Every quote includes the assumptions needed to show a clear UX: path, expected output, and execution bounds.

Composable permissions

Limit approvals, scope recipients, and keep routing logic separate from signing logic to reduce footguns.

Ship a routing UI that feels instant.

Clean layout, strong typography, and subtle motion — tuned for mobile first, then scaled up.

Open app Talk to us

FAQ

A few quick answers to keep the page lightweight.

Is this an onchain router or an offchain quoting service?

Both patterns can be supported. The UI is designed to represent offchain quotes and then execute deterministic onchain paths.

Can I plug in my own adapters?

Yes. Adapters are designed as composable units so teams can integrate new protocols while keeping UX stable.

Is the landing page tied to a specific chain?

No. The design language is chain-agnostic and takes inspiration from modern L2 product marketing without copying it.

QIE Smart Router

A clean, Polygon-inspired marketing layout built for mobile-first readability.
